profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Update your personal details and profile information

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure
changePassword.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters and include a letter, a number, and a special character

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account

marketing.title: Marketing Emails
marketing.description: Receive updates about new features and promotions

status.title: Security Status
status.enabled: Your account has enhanced security measures enabled.
status.disabled: Your account could be more secure. Enable two-factor authentication.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactor.setupInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the verification code below.

loginNotifications.title: Login Notifications
loginNotifications.description: Receive notifications for new login attempts

tip.title: Security Tip
tip.description: Never share your password or verification codes with anyone, including Vercel support.
